page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is an arm64-based general-purpose server instance powered by the Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and includes a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Benchmark data shows strong multi-threaded decompression capabilities, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression reaching 169.28 GB/sec, placing it in the top 25%. Passmark memory benchmarks also score in the top 25% at 2888.01. However, cryptographic performance is a notable tradeoff, with the Passmark CPU encryption test scoring in the bottom 25% at 2628.18. Other compute metrics, including stress-ng single-core (1817.38) and multi-core (28931.82) performance, fall within the average range.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is classified as a general-purpose server. It is suited for multi-threaded decompression tasks, database operations, and static web serving, where it delivers 23.5 GB/sec of throughput. The arm64 architecture offers resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that do not rely heavily on x86-specific instruction sets or intensive cryptographic operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is an arm64-based general-purpose server powered by a 16-core Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 64.0 GB of RAM, a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides dedicated CPU allocation with one thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. Benchmark results indicate strong multi-threaded decompression and memory performance, though cryptographic execution is relatively weak. This server is suited for database operations, static web serving, and general-purpose arm64 workloads. It offers qualitative cost efficiency for deployments that benefit from high resource density and do not require x86-specific instructions. The processor includes 64 KB L1 data cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 64 MB L3 cache, supporting AES cryptography but lacking AVX or AMX extensions.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.4xlarge is an arm64 server with 16 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 64 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-threaded decompression and memory performance.

tagline: An arm64 general-purpose server featuring sixteen dedicated cores and sixty-four gigabytes of memory for balanced multi-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM and a 10 Gbps baseline network interface
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and memory benchmark performance
